prompt: Create a square 4x4 black-and-white photobooth contact sheet using the uploaded person as a strict identity reference. Preserve their exact face, recognizable features and hairstyle across all 16 portraits. Same black T-shirt, gray backdrop, frontal flash, tight head-and-shoulders framing, natural skin, sharp eyes, high contrast, subtle analog grain and thin white gutters.
promptEn: Create a square 4x4 black-and-white photobooth contact sheet using the uploaded person as a strict identity reference. Preserve their exact face, recognizable features and hairstyle across all 16 portraits. Same black T-shirt, gray backdrop, frontal flash, tight head-and-shoulders framing, natural skin, sharp eyes, high contrast, subtle analog grain and thin white gutters.
promptZh: 使用上传的人物作为严格的身份参考，创建一张 4x4 的方形黑白照相亭样片。在所有 16 张肖像中保留其准确的面部特征、可辨识的五官和发型。统一使用 黑色 T 恤、灰色背景，采用正面闪光灯、紧凑的头部和肩部构图、自然肤色、锐利眼神、高对比度、细腻的胶片颗粒感以及细白边框。
